full_text:
Ma Zun 馬遵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Zun (馬遵). Was defeated by Shu and fled to Hu, drives Jiang Wei into Shu by his paranoia. Ma Zun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
